image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S019. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: 第一盘录像开始播放; 画面里，小林澈坐在厨房桌边; 母亲在哭. narration intent: 旁白 explains "第一盘录像开始播放。画面里，小林澈坐在厨房桌边，母亲在哭。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "这是真的？". shot positive notes: 录像画面，小林澈坐在厨房桌边，母亲哭泣，红杯在桌上，怀旧噪点，悲伤氛围.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: on table, must remain visually consistent. shot S019. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: 第一盘录像开始播放; 画面里，小林澈坐在厨房桌边; 母亲在哭. narration intent: 旁白 explains "第一盘录像开始播放。画面里，小林澈坐在厨房桌边，母亲在哭。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "这是真的？". shot positive notes: 录像画面，小林澈坐在厨房桌边，母亲哭泣，红杯在桌上，怀旧噪点，悲伤氛围.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, 模糊，过曝，卡通, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 第一盘录像开始播放。画面里，小林澈坐在厨房桌边，母亲在哭。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
